title: Eriosyce crispa
taxonomy: Eriosyce crispa is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Opuntioideae. The genus Eriosyce is a group of cacti native to the Atacama Desert and adjacent regions in Chile and Peru. Eriosyce crispa is one of the species within this genus. This species is known for its unique and distinctive characteristics.
